$comment_top: vision-ocr-detect example config. Copy to config.json and edit. Env-var overrides win over file values: see README 'Secrets (api_key)' for the priority chain. pydantic-settings (Settings class) auto-loads .env from the project root if present; $comment_* fields below are documentation only and are ignored at parse time (extra='ignore' on Settings).

server.$comment_server: HTTP listener settings. max_concurrent_requests caps simultaneous /api/detect calls; over-cap requests get 503 + Retry-After: 1 immediately.

providers.$comment_providers: Each entry registers a vision/OCR backend. Set 'type' to a value supported by src/vision_ocr_detect/providers/{type}.py. The provider name (key) is what profiles reference via 'provider' field — keep it stable once profiles depend on it.

local-ollama.$comment_ollama: Default. Free, local, fast. Native /api/generate is tried first; OpenAI-compat /v1 fallback for models that don't speak native. api_key is unused (set null).

openrouter.$comment_openrouter: Cloud gateway at https://openrouter.ai — OpenAI-compatible. api_key=null is OK; OPENROUTER_API_KEY auto-loads from process env or .env (project root) via pydantic-settings. config.json의 api_key가 명시되면 그것이 우선. cost_per_1k_* should be set to OpenRouter's published per-model pricing for accurate cost_usd in detect responses; 0.0 is a placeholder that always reports free.
